series_metadata.series_description: Rules, regulations, bylaws, and/or standards of agency which may be codified and made part of the Ohio Administrative Code. Files may contain letters proposing rules, letters making rules effective, public hearing notices, rules summaries and fiscal analysis.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 15 years after sent to Records Center. Records to be reviewed by State Archives and then destroy. ; Paper: Retain 15 years after sent to Records Center. Records to be reviewed by State Archives and then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
